title: Rei is cold
wikitext:
[]: Rei is cold! Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Feb 08, 2011 11:34 am Do you guys think that Rei´s skin would feel cold if you touched her?

[]: Post by Xard » Tue Feb 08, 2011 11:35 am she has blood circulation. Of course not and if she was cold... SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by C.A.P. » Tue Feb 08, 2011 11:36 am i like this thread. it's silly. (btw, just let that hair grow. everybody wins)

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 08, 2011 11:48 am Sadamoto said that Rei smells like a hospital (seriously) so maybe that means her skin is cold too? Not sure.

[]: Post by Xard » Tue Feb 08, 2011 11:52 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Sadamoto said that Rei smells like a hospital (seriously) so maybe that means her skin is cold too? Not sure.

[]: Post by Grimmjow » Tue Feb 08, 2011 12:54 pm Thanks for killing the mood Sadamoto, the same way you turned Kaworu into a complete sociopath by killing a kitteh. Rei probably does feel slightly cold.

[]: Post by NemZ » Tue Feb 08, 2011 2:17 pm As pale as she is I think it's entirely believable she might have poor circulation and thus be somewhat cool, at least compared to most folks.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Tue Feb 08, 2011 2:42 pm The more I find out about Evangelion's production process from translated Anno interviews and such, the more I have to assume Sadamoto was the only one on the team with the slightest idea of what he was doing. You guys are way too harsh on him.

[]: Post by Xard » Tue Feb 08, 2011 2:45 pm esselfortium wrote: The more I find out about Evangelion's production process from translated Anno interviews and such, the more I have to assume Sadamoto was the only one on the team with the slightest idea of what he was doing. You guys are way too harsh on him.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Tue Feb 08, 2011 2:54 pm Thanks for proving my point

[]: Post by Azathoth » Tue Feb 08, 2011 2:59 pm esselfortium wrote: Thanks for proving my point

[]: Post by esselfortium » Tue Feb 08, 2011 3:03 pm No it isn't. Anyway, Rei is pretty cool. That's what this thread, and by extension America, is all about, isn't it?

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Feb 08, 2011 3:04 pm Yes, InstrumentalityOne. You probably do need a hobby. Sailor Star Dust wrote: Sadamoto said that Rei smells like a hospital (seriously) so maybe that means her skin is cold too? Not sure.

[]: Re: Rei is cold! Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Feb 08, 2011 3:08 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: Do you guys think that Rei´s skin would feel cold if you touched her?

[]: Re: Rei is cold! Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Feb 08, 2011 3:13 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Otherwise, shouldn't the thread title be "Rei is COOL"?

[]: Re: Rei is cold! Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Feb 08, 2011 3:18 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Otherwise, shouldn't the thread title be "Rei is COOL"?

[]: Re: Rei is cold! Post by BC Baron » Tue Feb 08, 2011 3:20 pm Mr. Tines wrote: ...her extremities will be cold from September to June...

[]: Post by Azathoth » Tue Feb 08, 2011 3:22 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Hospitals don't smell like human sweat and blood from birthing mothers at times?

[]: Post by Trajan » Tue Feb 08, 2011 4:34 pm Tune in next week for our new thread, Mari is lukewarm.

[]: Post by liquidus118 » Tue Feb 08, 2011 5:34 pm Trajan wrote: Tune in next week for our new thread, Mari is lukewarm.
